title: Senior Software Engineer - Ninjacart - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Ninjacart - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Ninjacart invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ninjacart:
Ninjacart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ninjacart!
